svg.text: The model: one round, iterated, self-only
own candidates' share of the pool mean
outside source: share u at level s
the selection term: agreement ρ × spread σ
a fraction u of the distance closed each round
one selection step ρσ per round
Symbols — every quantity in the model

text.tspan: — balance point (fixed point of the mixed pool)
— measured at round 1, see the measurements figure.
